title: MD
biography: Aaron Beck was an American psychiatrist who is considered the father of cognitive behavioral therapy (CBT). His evidence-based approach to treating depression and anxiety has become the most widely practiced form of psychotherapy worldwide.
aiSummary: Aaron Beck is a psychiatry specialist at University of Pennsylvania. Based in Philadelphia.
